commit_message: fix(spi): Update spi according to newest version of py2hwsw fix(spi): Update spi according to newest version of py2hwsw Related to PR https://github.com/IObundle/py2hwsw/pull/379

examples.commit_message: fix(spi): Update spi according to newest version of py2hwsw fix(spi): Update spi according to newest version of py2hwsw Related to PR https://github.com/IObundle/py2hwsw/pull/379
examples.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 `timescale 1ns / 1ps
 
 `include "iob_spi_master_conf.vh"
-`include "iob_spi_master_csrs_def.vh"
+`include "iob_spi_master_csrs_conf.vh"
 
 `ifdef FLASH_ADDR_W
 `define FLASH_CACHE_ADDR_W `FLASH_ADDR_W
@@ -76,42 +76,50 @@ module iob_spi_master #(
    wire dq0_tri_in;
    wire dq0_tri_en;
    wire dq0_tri_out;
-   iob_iobuf dq0_buf (
-      .i_i(dq0_tri_in),
-      .t_i(dq0_tri_en),
-      .n_i(1'b0),
-      .o_o(dq0_tri_out),
-      .io (mosi_io)
+   iob_iobuf #(
+      .FPGA_TOOL(FPGA_TOOL)
+   ) dq0_buf (
+      .i_i  (dq0_tri_in),
+      .t_i  (dq0_tri_en),
+      .n_i  (1'b0),
+      .o_o  (dq0_tri_out),
+      .io_io(mosi_io)
    );
    wire dq1_tri_in;
    wire dq1_tri_en;
    wire dq1_tri_out;
-   iob_iobuf dq1_buf (
-      .i_i(dq1_tri_in),
-      .t_i(dq1_tri_en),
-      .n_i(1'b0),
-      .o_o(dq1_tri_out),
-      .io (miso_io)
+   iob_iobuf #(
+      .FPGA_TOOL(FPGA_TOOL)
+   ) dq1_buf (
+      .i_i  (dq1_tri_in),
+      .t_i  (dq1_tri_en),
+      .n_i  (1'b0),
+      .o_o  (dq1_tri_out),
+      .io_io(miso_io)
    );
    wire dq2_tri_in;
    wire dq2_tri_en;
    wire dq2_tri_out;
-   iob_iobuf dq2_buf (
-      .i_i(dq2_tri_in),
-      .t_i(dq2_tri_en),
-      .n_i(1'b0),
-      .o_o(dq2_tri_out),
-      .io (wp_n_io)
+   iob_iobuf #(
+      .FPGA_TOOL(FPGA_TOOL)
+   ) dq2_buf (
+      .i_i  (dq2_tri_in),
+      .t_i  (dq2_tri_en),
+      .n_i  (1'b0),
+      .o_o  (dq2_tri_out),
+      .io_io(wp_n_io)
    );
    wire dq3_tri_in;
    wire dq3_tri_en;
    wire dq3_tri_out;
-   iob_iobuf dq3_buf (
-      .i_i(dq3_tri_in),
-      .t_i(dq3_tri_en),
-      .n_i(1'b0),
-      .o_o(dq3_tri_out),
-      .io (hold_n_io)
+   iob_iobuf #(
+      .FPGA_TOOL(FPGA_TOOL)
+   ) dq3_buf (
+      .i_i  (dq3_tri_in),
+      .t_i  (dq3_tri_en),
+      .n_i  (1'b0),
+      .o_o  (dq3_tri_out),
+      .io_io(hold_n_io)
    );
 
    //Instantiate core
@@ -129,10 +137,10 @@ module iob_spi_master #(
       .dummy_cycles_i   (fl_command_wr[19:16]),
       .frame_struct_i   (fl_command_wr[29:20]),
       .xipbit_en_i      (fl_command_wr[31:30]),
-      .commtype_i       (fl_commandtP_wr[2:0]),
-      .dtr_en_i         (fl_commandtP_wr[20]),
-      .fourbyteaddr_on_i(fl_commandtP_wr[21]),
-      .spimode_i        (fl_commandtP_wr[31:30]),
+      .commtype_i       (fl_command_type_wr[2:0]),
+      .dtr_en_i         (fl_command_type_wr[20]),
+      .fourbyteaddr_on_i(fl_command_type_wr[21]),
+      .spimode_i        (fl_command_type_wr[31:30]),
       .validflag_i      (valid_int),
       .tready_o         (readyflash_int),

@@ -28,15 +28,15 @@ def setup(py_params_dict):
                 "name": "ADDR_W",
                 "descr": "Address bus width",
                 "type": "P",
-                "val": "`IOB_SPI_MASTER_CSRS_CSRS_ADDR_W",
+                "val": "`IOB_SPI_MASTER_CSRS_ADDR_W",
                 "min": "NA",
                 "max": "NA",
             },
             {
                 "name": "FL_ADDR_W",
                 "descr": "",
                 "type": "P",
-                "val": "`IOB_SPI_MASTER_CSRS_CSRS_ADDR_W",
+                "val": "`IOB_SPI_MASTER_CSRS_ADDR_W",
                 "min": "NA",
                 "max": "NA",
             },

                 "min": "NA",
                 "max": "NA",
             },
+            {  # For iob_iobuf
+                "name": "FPGA_TOOL",
+                "descr": "Use IPs from fpga tool. Avaliable options: 'XILINX', 'other'.",
+                "type": "P",
+                "val": '"XILINX"',
+                "min": "NA",
+                "max": "NA",
+            },
         ],
         "ports": [
             {
@@ -57,13 +65,6 @@ def setup(py_params_dict):
                     "type": "iob_clk",
                 },
             },
-            {
-                "name": "iob_s",
-                "descr": "CPU native interface",
-                "signals": {
-                    "type": "iob",
-                },
-            },
             # { FIXME: Find alternative for 'if_defined'
             #     "name": "cache_iob_s",
             #     "descr": "Cache interface.",
@@ -142,10 +143,10 @@ def setup(py_params_dict):
                 ],
             },
             {
-                "name": "fl_commandtp",
+                "name": "fl_command_type",
                 "descr": "",
                 "signals": [
-                    {"name": "fl_commandtp_wr", "width": 32},
+                    {"name": "fl_command_type_wr", "width": 32},
                 ],
             },
             {
@@ -209,7 +210,7 @@ def setup(py_params_dict):
                         "log2n_items": 0,
                     },
                     {
-                        "name": "fl_commandtp",
+                        "name": "fl_command_type",
                         "descr": "FL command type: [31:30]spimode|[29:22]N/A|[21]fourbyteaddr|[20]dtr|[19:3]N/A|[2:0]commtype",
                         "mode": "W",
                         "n_bits": 32,
@@ -250,7 +251,7 @@ def setup(py_params_dict):
                     "fl_datain_o": "fl_datain",
                     "fl_address_o": "fl_address",
                     "fl_command_o": "fl_command",
-                    "fl_commandtp_o": "fl_commandtp",

                     "fl_validflg_o": "fl_validflg",
                     "fl_ready_i": "fl_ready",
                     "fl_dataout_i": "fl_dataout",
